---
title: "Introduction to aRtpalette package"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Introduction to aRtpalette package}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

The `aRtpalette` package provides convenience functions for some common tasks. To install this package from GitHub, use 

```{r, eval=FALSE}
# install.packages("remotes")
# install.packages("devtools")
devtools::install_github("aRtpalette")
```

Load the package using the following code.

```{r setup}
library(aRtpalette)
```

The package contains three functions

* `palette_from_hex`

* `plot_palette`
* `apply_palette`
